children.heading: Establishment authorized
children.label: a Establishment authorized
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, the Secretary is authorized to establish and maintain within the Department the Rural Business and Cooperative Development Service and to assign to the Service such functions as the Secretary considers appropriate.
Section 313 and title V of the Rural Electrification Act of 1936 ( and 950aa et seq.).7 U.S.C. 940c
Subtitle G of title XVI of the Food, Agriculture, Conservation, and Trade Act of 1990.1See References in Text note below.1
